name: pi-star-router
description_en: StarRouter is a focused model-routing extension for Pi. It chooses the best available model and thinking level for each prompt using a deterministic heuristic prompt profiler, Artificial Analysis benchmark data, provider-scoped model pools, strict model i
description_zh: StarRouter 是 Pi 的专注模型路由扩展。它使用确定性启发式提示分析器、人工分析基准数据、提供商作用域模型池和严格模型 i 为每个提示选择最佳可用模型和思考级别
